summary: Iter26 — JAPAP CONNECT (WiFi community rewards) fully tested end-to-end. Backend: 28/28 pytest cases PASS. Frontend: /connect page + admin Connect tab + Settings group verified via Playwright. Rewards flow confirmed: Alice→Bob 130s backdated session → $0.081 USD reward (base 0.05 + per_min 0.002×2 = 0.054 × 1.5 Pro multiplier) credited to Bob's wallet in XAF; user-hotspot cap=1/day enforced (blocked:true, reward=0); reward cap 0.50 enforced when base bumped to 10 USD; connect_enabled=false returns 503; pro_required_to_share=true blocks Alice with 403; admin block/unblock/sponsor all work + audit logs recorded.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/connect.py: `/end` owner check runs BEFORE `status != 'active'` branch, so a user trying to double-end their OWN connection hits 'already_ended' correctly, but a different user on an already-ended session gets 403 (test captures this behavior — acceptable).

routes/connect_admin.py: audit log `details` is built via f-string JSON concat instead of json.dumps — vulnerable if sponsor_name or reason contains a double-quote or newline. Low risk (admin-only input) but should use json.dumps for safety.
routes/connect.py nearby: haversine precision verified to ~0.01 km tolerance at Douala coords — good.
routes/connect.py /start: cap logic counts ALL sessions (including previously blocked ones) toward the (user, hotspot) cap — this correctly prevents Alice from trying repeatedly; no issue.
No WiFi credentials ever persisted — HotspotCreate schema has no password/SSID auth fields, confirmed by code review. Security requirement satisfied.
Consider adding DB index on wifi_connections(started_at, user_id) and (ip_address, started_at) for the per-day cap queries under heavier load.
test_credentials: admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024!, bob@japap.com / Test1234! (Pro), alice@japap.com / Test1234!
seed_data_creation: Test fixture DELETEs wifi_hotspots + wifi_connections before and after the module; creates 1 Bob hotspot in Douala for duration of tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter26 pytest file is regression-ready. Fixture auto-cleans wifi tables + restores default settings (connect_enabled=true, reward_per_connection_usd=0.05, pro_mult=1.5, cap 0.50, min 60s, caps 5/5/1). Frontend selectors: data-testid=connect-page/tab-nearby/tab-mine/tab-leaderboard/create-hotspot-btn/create-hotspot-modal/hotspot-alias/hotspot-address/create-hotspot-submit for /connect; admin-tab-connect/connect-admin-tab/connect-filters for /admin.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. All 28 backend tests green. Frontend UI structure correct, disclaimer about password-not-stored present in share modal, 12 connect_* settings exposed in admin Settings.
